response.justification: Bogdan is clearly a strong, versatile senior engineer, but his profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. His C++ experience is limited to a roughly seven-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a university thesis, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++. His database experience lists MySQL and MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and he has no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background — RIDE Capital was a Node/TypeScript fintech, not a capital-markets environment. The core stack and domain gaps are too large for a consulting engagement expecting immediate productivity.
strengths: Deep general engineering seniority across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby
Some C/C++ exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI components, C++ thesis) plus Java and scripting familiarity
concerns: No sustained professional C++ experience; last meaningful C++ work was ~7 months a decade ago
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no Windows-platform development depth
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
